FluentGpu
Table of Contents

Struct SpanStyle

Namespace
FluentGpu.Foundation
Assembly
FluentGpu.Foundation.dll

The POD shaping overlay for one span of a span run: the UTF-16 char range [Start, End) of the CONCATENATED paragraph text plus the style deltas the text seam applies over the base TextStyle. Weight 0 / SizeDip 0 / FontFamily empty / Color A==0 = inherit the base. Built by the reconciler from TextSpans; resolved by both text backends and the glyph renderer through Shared, so measure ≡ hit-test ≡ render for span runs too.

public readonly record struct SpanStyle : IEquatable<SpanStyle>
Implements
IEquatable<SpanStyle>
Inherited Members
ValueType.Equals(object)
ValueType.GetHashCode()
ValueType.ToString()
object.Equals(object, object)
object.GetType()
object.ReferenceEquals(object, object)

Constructors

SpanStyle(int, int, ushort, float, StringId, ColorF, byte)

The POD shaping overlay for one span of a span run: the UTF-16 char range [Start, End) of the CONCATENATED paragraph text plus the style deltas the text seam applies over the base TextStyle. Weight 0 / SizeDip 0 / FontFamily empty / Color A==0 = inherit the base. Built by the reconciler from TextSpans; resolved by both text backends and the glyph renderer through Shared, so measure ≡ hit-test ≡ render for span runs too.

public SpanStyle(int Start, int End, ushort Weight, float SizeDip, StringId FontFamily, ColorF Color, byte Flags)

Parameters

Start int
End int
Weight ushort
SizeDip float
FontFamily StringId
Color ColorF
Flags byte

Fields

LinkBit

Hyperlink span: Hand cursor over its laid rects; click fires the element's TextSpan.OnClick (RichTextBlock.cpp:2995 SetCursor(MouseCursorHand)).

public const byte LinkBit = 4

Field Value

byte

StrikethroughBit

Draw the face-metric strikethrough bar through this span.

public const byte StrikethroughBit = 2

Field Value

byte

UnderlineBit

Draw the face-metric underline bar under this span (WinUI TextDecorations.Underline, per wrapped line).

public const byte UnderlineBit = 1

Field Value

byte

FluentGpu — a near-zero-allocation, NativeAOT, GPU-rendered UI engine for .NET 10. Usage docs live here; architecture canon lives in design/ (SPEC-INDEX.md is the precedence authority).
